description: Diff-aware browser validation planning for downstream operator, email, and admin surfaces influenced by this repo. This is the enterprise translation of expect-style browser proof: reviewable manifests, explicit artifacts, and path-to-suite mapping instead of an opaque local TUI.

targets.name: Downstream operator or runtime admin surface
targets.owner: Downstream product owner with AutoMindLab runtime owner review

suites.description: Validate operator/admin flows after manifest, approval-policy, or runtime-doc changes.
steps: Navigate to the operator or runtime-admin route suggested by routeHints.
Exercise the action or view that corresponds to the changed operator manifest or approval policy.
Capture a screenshot and console log proving the reviewed state.
suites.notes: Use this when operator contracts, approval policy, or manifest-backed actions changed.

targets.name: Downstream inbox, thread, or email-admin surface
targets.owner: Runtime owner with downstream product owner review

suites.description: Validate inbox, thread, and mailbox-routing surfaces after AgentMail contract or policy changes.
steps: Open the authenticated email surface using a real operator session.
Verify the expected mailbox identity is visible and correctly labeled.
Open a representative thread or compose flow without sending irreversible traffic unless separately approved.
Capture screenshot, console log, and network log proof for the reviewed state.
suites.notes: This suite is for email runtime and mailbox contract changes. It does not authorize live outbound sends by itself.

suites.description: Validate the downstream proof surface when browser-validation planning itself changed.
steps: Open the downstream validation or QA surface.
Confirm the target routes and artifact capture flow still match the manifest.
Capture proof artifacts required by the changed suite.
suites.notes: Use this to prove the proof-gathering surface did not drift from the manifest.
